narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 3-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,013 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
